claim: Replacing ce_archiver_ack_count with a session-scoped backup watermark check eliminates one state variable without weakening P19 (ArchiverDAMonotonicity) or P18 (CEArchiverSafetyGuarantee), fixes the idempotency bug, and scopes GC to current-session effects only so old-session archiver data is preserved for double-crash recovery.
preconditions: The spec has exactly one CE backup (ce_backup_applied is a single set, not per-replica). ArchiverGCByAcks models backup-to-archiver ack propagation as a counter ce_archiver_ack_count[a][s] that increments each time the action fires for (a, s). There is no guard preventing re-counting the same backup confirmation. With one backup, the maximum meaningful ack count is 1, making GC_K > 1 structurally unreachable through legitimate means but trivially reachable through re-firing. ArchiverGCByCheckpoint provides an independent, authoritative GC path via L1 checkpoint. Effects in ce_archiver_store carry a .session field identifying which CE primary session produced them.
structural_delta: State complexity: before = |CEArchivers| * MaxSeq integers (ce_archiver_ack_count). After = 0 new variables. ce_archiver_ack_count is eliminated. ArchiverGCByAcks becomes a session-scoped watermark-based GC that removes only current-session effects with seq <= MaxOfSet(ce_backup_applied), preserving all old-session effects unconditionally. P19 is rewritten with session-aware disjuncts and no vacuous escape.
diff:
--- a/spec.tla
+++ b/spec.tla
@@ line 85 @@
-    ce_archiver_ack_count,
 
@@ lines 108-109: archiverVars definition @@
-archiverVars == <<ce_archiver_store, ce_archiver_ack_count,
-                  ob_archiver_store, ob_archiver_pending, oms_archiver_store>>
+archiverVars == <<ce_archiver_store,
+                  ob_archiver_store, ob_archiver_pending, oms_archiver_store>>
 
@@ line 192: Init @@
-    /\ ce_archiver_ack_count = [a \in CEArchivers |-> [s \in 1..MaxSeq |-> 0]]
 
@@ lines 631-634: ArchiverIngestCE UNCHANGED @@
-    /\ UNCHANGED <<ceVars, obVars, omsVars, cacheVars,
-                   msgVars,
-                   ce_archiver_ack_count, ob_archiver_store, ob_archiver_pending,
-                   oms_archiver_store, obBackupVars>>
+    /\ UNCHANGED <<ceVars, obVars, omsVars, cacheVars,
+                   msgVars,
+                   ob_archiver_store, ob_archiver_pending,
+                   oms_archiver_store, obBackupVars>>
 
@@ lines 645-648: ArchiverIngestCEFromBackup UNCHANGED @@
-    /\ UNCHANGED <<ceVars, obVars, omsVars, cacheVars,
-                   msgVars,
-                   ce_archiver_ack_count, ob_archiver_store, ob_archiver_pending,
-                   oms_archiver_store, obBackupVars>>
+    /\ UNCHANGED <<ceVars, obVars, omsVars, cacheVars,
+                   msgVars,
+                   ob_archiver_store, ob_archiver_pending,
+                   oms_archiver_store, obBackupVars>>
 
@@ lines 658-661: ArchiverIngestOB UNCHANGED @@
-    /\ UNCHANGED <<ceVars, obVars, omsVars, cacheVars,
-                   msgVars,
-                   ce_archiver_store, ce_archiver_ack_count, ob_archiver_pending,
-                   oms_archiver_store, obBackupVars>>
+    /\ UNCHANGED <<ceVars, obVars, omsVars, cacheVars,
+                   msgVars,
+                   ce_archiver_store, ob_archiver_pending,
+                   oms_archiver_store, obBackupVars>>
 
@@ lines 672-675: ArchiverIngestOBPending UNCHANGED @@
-    /\ UNCHANGED <<ceVars, obVars, omsVars, cacheVars,
-                   msgVars,
-                   ce_archiver_store, ce_archiver_ack_count, ob_archiver_store,
-                   oms_archiver_store, obBackupVars>>
+    /\ UNCHANGED <<ceVars, obVars, omsVars, cacheVars,
+                   msgVars,
+                   ce_archiver_store, ob_archiver_store,
+                   oms_archiver_store, obBackupVars>>
 
@@ lines 684-687: ArchiverIngestOMS UNCHANGED @@
-    /\ UNCHANGED <<ceVars, obVars, omsVars, cacheVars,
-                   msgVars,
-                   ce_archiver_store, ce_archiver_ack_count, ob_archiver_store,
-                   ob_archiver_pending, obBackupVars>>
+    /\ UNCHANGED <<ceVars, obVars, omsVars, cacheVars,
+                   msgVars,
+                   ce_archiver_store, ob_archiver_store,
+                   ob_archiver_pending, obBackupVars>>
 
@@ lines 689-703: ArchiverGCByAcks @@
-\* Archiver GC by k-of-N backup acks
-ArchiverGCByAcks(a) ==
-    /\ a \in CEArchivers
-    /\ \E s \in 1..MaxSeq :
-        /\ s \in ce_backup_applied
-        /\ ce_archiver_ack_count' = [ce_archiver_ack_count EXCEPT ![a] =
-               [@ EXCEPT ![s] = @ + 1]]
-        /\ IF ce_archiver_ack_count[a][s] + 1 >= GC_K
-           THEN ce_archiver_store' = [ce_archiver_store EXCEPT ![a] =
-                    {e \in @ : e.seq > s}]
-           ELSE ce_archiver_store' = ce_archiver_store
-    /\ UNCHANGED <<ceVars, obVars, omsVars, cacheVars,
-                   msgVars,
-                   ob_archiver_store, ob_archiver_pending, oms_archiver_store,
-                   obBackupVars>>
+\* Archiver GC by backup watermark (session-scoped)
+ArchiverGCByAcks(a) ==
+    /\ a \in CEArchivers
+    /\ ce_alive
+    /\ ce_backup_applied /= {}
+    /\ LET watermark == MaxOfSet(ce_backup_applied)
+       IN /\ \E e \in ce_archiver_store[a] :
+                 e.session = ce_primary /\ e.seq <= watermark
+          /\ ce_archiver_store' = [ce_archiver_store EXCEPT ![a] =
+                 {e \in @ : e.session /= ce_primary \/ e.seq > watermark}]
+    /\ UNCHANGED <<ceVars, obVars, omsVars, cacheVars,
+                   msgVars,
+                   ob_archiver_store, ob_archiver_pending, oms_archiver_store,
+                   obBackupVars>>
 
@@ lines 711-714: ArchiverGCByCheckpoint UNCHANGED @@
-    /\ UNCHANGED <<ceVars, obVars, omsVars, cacheVars,
-                   msgVars,
-                   ce_archiver_ack_count, ob_archiver_store, ob_archiver_pending,
-                   oms_archiver_store, obBackupVars>>
+    /\ UNCHANGED <<ceVars, obVars, omsVars, cacheVars,
+                   msgVars,
+                   ob_archiver_store, ob_archiver_pending,
+                   oms_archiver_store, obBackupVars>>
 
@@ lines 1006-1011: P19 (ArchiverDAMonotonicity) @@
-ArchiverDAMonotonicity ==
-    \* CE archivers: effects only removed when seq <= checkpoint or k acks reached
-    /\ \A a \in CEArchivers :
-        \A e \in ce_archiver_store[a] :
-            \/ e.seq > ce_checkpoint_seq
-            \/ ce_archiver_ack_count[a][e.seq] < GC_K
+ArchiverDAMonotonicity ==
+    \* CE archivers: effects only removed when seq <= checkpoint
+    \* or (current-session, seq <= backup watermark). old-session effects
+    \* are only removable via checkpoint.
+    /\ \A a \in CEArchivers :
+        \A e \in ce_archiver_store[a] :
+            \/ e.seq > ce_checkpoint_seq
+            \/ e.session /= ce_primary
+            \/ (ce_backup_applied /= {} /\ e.seq > MaxOfSet(ce_backup_applied))
rationale: REVISION addressing two critical flaws from round 0. (1) Session-scoped GC: The original watermark filter {e : e.seq > watermark} was session-blind, causing cross-session data loss on double-crash. The reviewer demonstrated a concrete trace: after view change, new-session backup progress creates a watermark that GC's old-session effects. The fix adds e.session /= ce_primary to the GC filter, so only current-session effects are removed by watermark GC. Old-session effects survive in the archiver until checkpoint advances past them (ArchiverGCByCheckpoint is the only path that removes old-session data). (2) P19 without vacuous disjunct: The original revision included 'ce_backup_applied = {}' as a third disjunct, making P19 trivially true after every CEViewChange. The fix removes this escape hatch. The revised P19 states: an effect in the archiver is valid if (a) e.seq > ce_checkpoint_seq (not yet checkpointed), OR (b) e.session /= ce_primary (old-session effect, not touchable by watermark GC), OR (c) ce_backup_applied /= {} /\ e.seq > MaxOfSet(ce_backup_applied) (current-session effect above watermark). When ce_backup_applied = {}, only disjuncts (a) and (b) apply. Disjunct (b) covers all old-session effects. Disjunct (a) covers current-session effects that haven't been checkpointed. The GC guard ce_backup_applied /= {} prevents any watermark GC when backup_applied is empty, so no current-session effects can be removed in that window, and disjunct (a) constrains them. (3) Liveness guard: ArchiverGCByAcks now requires ce_alive, preventing GC during recovery windows when ce_backup_applied hasn't been populated yet for the new session. (4) Idempotency guard: The action checks that the archiver actually contains at least one current-session effect with seq <= watermark before firing, preventing spurious re-firing on already-clean stores. (5) All 6 UNCHANGED clauses referencing ce_archiver_ack_count are enumerated explicitly.
